_translated_editions.name: The Berry Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: The Sugarfree Energy Drink with the taste of forest fruits complemented by exciting herbal notes of verbena.

_translated_editions.name: The Red Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Red Edition with the fresh taste of watermelon.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink Zero
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Zero serves up the same Wings as Red Bull Energy Drink and Red Bull Sugarfree, but with a totally new taste sweetened with monk fruit extract.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by top athletes, busy professionals, university students and travellers on long journeys.

_translated_editions.name: The Blue Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Blue Edition. The Energy Drink with the fruity taste of blueberry.

_translated_editions.name: The Winter Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Winter Edition with the exotic taste of passionfruit, rounded off with elderflower notes.

_translated_editions.name: The Coconut Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Get ready for an extraordinary taste experience. The Red Bull White Edition with the taste of exotic coconut and fruity blueberry.

_translated_editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: Wings without sugars: Red Bull Sugarfree is Red Bull Energy Drink without sugars.

_translated_editions.name: The Tropical Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Tropical Edition. Experience the exotic taste of tropical fruits.

_translated_editions.name: The Peach Edition
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Peach Edition offers the taste of white peach with a touch of citrus peel and floral notes.

_translated_editions.name: The Lilac Edition Sugarfree
_translated_editions.description: The Red Bull Lilac Edition Sugarfree gives you Wings with the delicate taste of grapefruit and blossom.
